name: @aristotle/observability-otel
description: First-party OpenTelemetry tracer adapter for AristotleOS. Wraps any structurally-OTel-shaped Tracer as an AristotleTracer so the substrate's gate spans land in your OTel-compatible backend (Tempo, Jaeger, Honeycomb, Langfuse, LangSmith, Phoenix, Datadog, AWS X-Ray) without forcing @opentelemetry/api as a hard dep on every substrate consumer.
